mapper.select: WITH viewer AS ( SELECT style_embedding FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} ), candidate AS ( SELECT g.id, g.name, g.address, g.thumbnail_url, g.region_code, g.rating_avg, g.rating_count, 6371 * acos(GREATEST(-1.0, LEAST(1.0, cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(g.lat)) * cos(radians(g.lng) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(g.lat)) ))) AS distance_km, CASE WHEN viewer.style_embedding IS NOT NULL AND g.style_embedding IS NOT NULL THEN viewer.style_embedding <=> g.style_embedding ELSE NULL END AS ranking_distance FROM gyms g CROSS JOIN viewer WHERE g.lat IS NOT NULL AND g.lng IS NOT NULL AND g.status = 'active' AND g.deleted_at IS NULL ) SELECT id, name, address, thumbnail_url, region_code, rating_avg, rating_count, distance_km, ranking_distance FROM candidate WHERE distance_km <= #{radiusKm} ORDER BY CASE WHEN ranking_distance IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, ranking_distance ASC, distance_km ASC, rating_avg DESC, rating_count DESC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
